entry.title: GitHub Copilot
entry.description: AI developer assistant across GitHub, editors, pull requests, chat, code review, and agentic coding workflows.
entry.seoDescription: GitHub Copilot supports AI coding, chat, review, and agentic development workflows across GitHub and editors.
entry.author: GitHub
entry.cardDescription: AI developer assistant across GitHub and editors.
entry.body:
## Editorial notes

GitHub Copilot is useful for teams that want AI assistance tied directly to repository hosting, pull requests, and editor workflows.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
